query: What is the current license posture for blocked runtime dependencies?

observations.title: Old permissive dependency rule
observations.content: Older exploratory note incorrectly allowed BSL-like licenses for runtime dependencies. Superseded.

observations.title: Current license allowlist/blocklist
observations.content: Current doctrine allows MIT/BSD/Apache/ISC/MPL-2.0/Unlicense/0BSD/Zlib and blocks AGPL/SSPL/BSL/Commons Clause/GPL at runtime.
